title: census loop sleeps before first ping
description: In server.rs the census loop calls tokio::time::sleep(7 days) BEFORE the first GET request, so the instance is never registered until a week after startup. If the process restarts weekly (e.g., Docker rolling deploy, OS reboot) it never pings at all. The sleep should come after the first request, not before.
close_reason: Fixed: census loop now pings immediately on startup, then sleeps 7d.
